Container.Name: abs-librarian-mcp
Container.Overview: MCP server that lets an AI assistant maintain a self-hosted Audiobookshelf library — metadata repair and file-system fixes (blob splitting, folder flattening, quarantine). Move-only, dry-run by default, path-jailed.

Config.Name: ABS_URL
Config.Description: URL of your Audiobookshelf instance (LAN address)

Config.Name: ABS_TOKEN
Config.Description: Audiobookshelf API token (Settings → Users → your user → API Token)

Config.Name: MCP_TOKEN
Config.Description: Bearer token Claude uses to connect to this MCP server (generate a long random string)

Config.Name: Audiobooks Path
Config.Description: Path to your audiobook library — must match the path Audiobookshelf uses

Config.Name: Quarantine Path
Config.Description: Where duplicates and unwanted files are moved (never deleted)

Config.Name: LIBRARY_ROOTS
Config.Description: Colon-separated container paths for the library (path jail)

Config.Name: DRY_RUN_DEFAULT
Config.Description: Safety: file tools default to dry-run. Each call must pass confirm=true to execute.

Config.Name: BLOB_HOURS_THRESHOLD
Config.Description: detect_blobs: flag items estimated over this many hours

Config.Name: BLOB_FILE_COUNT_THRESHOLD
Config.Description: detect_blobs: flag items with at least this many audio files
